Off Calendar Nov-25-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. PAMELA L. COX OF THE HEMAR RUSSO & HEALD, LLP, TEL. NO. (818) 501-3800 EXT. 173 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF BY TELEPHONE APPEARANCE;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF COMERICA BANK's Motion To Determine Party Prevailing On Contract And To Fix Amount Of Attorneys' Fees Awardable As Item As Costs At $13,275.00 is Granted. No opposition filed. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185 =302/ehg

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Determine Party Prevailing On Contract And To Fix Amount Of Attorneys' Fees Awardable As Item As Costs At $13,275.00
Off Calendar Nov-05-2013 Continued To Nov-25-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
PLAINTIFF COMERICA BANK's Motion To Determine Party Prevailing On Contract And To Fix Amount Of Attorneys' Fees Awardable As Item As Costs At $13,275.00 is continued to November 25, 2013 to give the moving party the opportunity to comply with Local Rule 2.6B. Moving party must deliver courtesy copies of the moving papers to Department 302, with a cover letter stating the new hearing date, no later than November 5, 2013 at 4:00 pm or the motion will be denied. Any exhibit must be separated by an exhibit tab per CRC 3.1110(f). Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185 =(302/MJM)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-12-2013 Off Calendar

Ntc Of Default Prove Up Hearings
Off Calendar Jul-16-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Donald Sullivan, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Sonia Wong, #11288.

Nathan H. Harris, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff, Comerica Bank.
No appearance by defaulted defendant(s) Integrity Recruiting, Inc., a California corporation, Angel Ahumada an individual.
Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.
Court ordered Defendants Does 1-100 dismissed without prejudice.
David W. Zittlow Sworn and examinded on behalf of Plaintiff.
After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant(s) as follows:

Damages: $71,109.50
Pre-Judgment Interest: $56,131.94
Attorney's Fees: to be detemined by way of declaration and or Memorandum of Costs.
Costs: $804.85
Total Judgment in the amount of $133,616.95
Judgment signed in open court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-17-2013 Continued To Aug-28-13 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
